title: Stech Market Data & Trends Analysis
description: Provide objective market data and observable trends for any asset (commodities, currencies, stocks, crypto) based on last 14 days. Does NOT give predictions or financial advice.

asset.title: Asset to analyze
asset.description: Example: Gold, Bitcoin, USD/IDR, Crude Oil, S&P 500

timeFrame.title: Scenario timeframe (illustrative)
timeFrame.description: Used for the hypothetical scenario if current trends hold. Example: '1 week', '2 weeks', '1 month'

startUrls.title: Optional: Data source URLs
startUrls.description: You can provide specific URLs for the AI to consider (optional).
